Then, to form the Empire of Russia within Rurik's lifetime, you need to do as the Varangians did and convert to the local culture and religion. Your neighbors will be happy and accept vassalage if you are de jure their liege (some gifts might be required). Use your once-per-lifetime Subjugation casus belli to conquer Minsk, then continue to use the Conquer Duchy casus belli.

description_en: Have your Dynasty erect a hundred runestones
how_to_en: Has taken the "Raise Runestone" decision 100 times. The fastest method involves a game exploit. In 1066, replace the Seljuk Emperor with a custom ruler of Norse culture who is 46 years old, unmarried, and has one son. Put all points into Stewardship. On game start, assign good tax collectors and completely max out the Wealth tree in the Stewardship lifestyle focus. Wait ten years, making sure you build up to around 6000 gold, then wait for the Dissolution Faction to form. Surrender to them. Now as Persia, give away as many of your titles as you can, keeping one duchy title and at least three counties that are part of it. Surrender to the faction again when it pops. Now as a duke, land your son with one of the counties in your realm, and land a random noble with the other. Drive down the random vassal's opinion, then try and fail to imprison him. Surrender to the rebellion to be deposed. Choose to play as your son, then raise the runestone (gaining a rank from count to duke allows it to be raised), invite your father to court, land him, imprison the vassal, and repeat until the achievement pops. Don't spend unnecessary gold and keep your income low; the cost of runestones scales with income, with the minimum being 50. You will need at least 5000 gold to complete this. It is not recommended to try to achieve this via normal gameplay. The runestone decision has a 10 year cooldown except in cases of death or deposition. It will therefore take 1000 years to complete the achievement, which is not possible in normal gameplay. The achievement relies on extraordinary circumstances to fire naturally; using one of these exploits is the only reliable method.

description_en: Starting and staying as a North Germanic Ásatrúan of any kind, Completely Control the Kingdom of Sicily before 1047. May not be available for characters created in the Ruler Designer.
how_to_en: North Germanic heritage or Norman culture; Asatru; Custom character Has North Germanic heritage or Norman culture; Asatru; Completely controls the Kingdom of Sicily; Is Independent; Date is before 1047.1.1. Although the steam achievement states Norse tribal, the in-game achievement has been changed to allow any government type, including Jarl Haesteinn who is now feudal. This will still trigger the steam achievement. Starting as Jarl Haesteinn in 867 use the Duchy conquest casus belli to seize Sicily while they are at war with the Byzantines. Move your capital to Palermo and start conquering small independent Counts and Dukes. For Byzantine territories, wait for a weakness or make allies to match their strength and use the Kingdom conquest casus belli to take all of the land in one war, since it could be a costly war keep it for the end. Alternatively, after taking enough non-Byzantine and Italian land to create the Kingdom, swear fealty to the Byzantines and the emperor should grant you the remaining de-jure counties in the Kingdom of Sicily. Follow this with an independence war when having a stronge enough faction or enough allies. Another approach (if the Roads to Power DLC is NOT installed, which keeps the Byzantines Feudal) would be to swear fealty to the Byzantine Emperor after you have seized Sicily, start by conquering the smaller independent realms and vassals of the Byzantine empire. You should modify your feudal contract to protect yourself from title revocation, you can always add religious rights to your contract later. You will then have to break away from the empire eventually and can do this via an independence faction, use your spy master to find hooks on the various dukes in the empire so you can force them to join. A few assassinations can also destabilize the empire. Once you are independent the achievement should fire.

description_en: Starting and staying as a North Germanic Ásatrúan of any kind, Completely Control the Kingdom of Thessalonika & hold any Empire without holding Byzantine Empire. May not be available for characters created in the Ruler Designer.
how_to_en: North Germanic heritage or Norman culture; Asatru; Custom character Has North Germanic heritage or Norman culture; Asatru; Completely controls the Kingdom of Thessalonika; Empire title; Byzantine Empire. Starting as Count Hæsteinn of Montaigu in 867, declare a conquest war on Count Gregorios of Napoli to reach the Diplomatic Range needed to declare on The Byzantine Empire. Hire mercenaries to fight for you to not waste your special soldiers, hire one company for the county war and save your money for later. If you capture any important couriers, make sure to ransom them for some extra money, which means extra soldiers. When you are ready, declare war on The Byzantine Empire with the Invade Kingdom casus belli and select Thessalonika. Preferably wait until The Byzantine Emprie is at war or deals with rebellions. Priortize sieging down counties close to the objective and preferably inside the objective. Eventually you will have to face the armies of The Byzantine Empire, defending will most times just about make you win, but getting them to cross a strait (for example between Kalliopolis and Lampsakos) will greatly increase your chances of winning. If you reset your perks at the start, you can chose to go the Gallant path. This will help with overal combat and decrese the war-score needed to win the war. You can now go on and create any empire you want. The Empire of Ajuraan only needs 18 counties and you can reach High Chiefdom of Naqis to not deal with The Tulunid Sultanate and The Abbasid Empire. Accept any Peasent Rabble's as it is way less trouble to have the lowered controll than dealing with the rebels, as you won't gain a lot of money from tax. Allying some big kingdoms with lots of men will help discourage The Byzantine Empire to retake provinces. Fortunately, most times they will implode.

description_en: Starting and staying as a North Germanic Ásatrúan of any kind, Completely Control everything in the Islands in the Atlantic and Mediterranean Region without ever having over 80 Realm Size
how_to_en: North Germanic heritage or Norman culture; Asatru Is North Germanic culture group or Norman; Asatru; Realm Size above 80 provinces; Completely controls the following: The following Duchies: Within the Kingdom of Norway: Iceland, Northern Isles; Within the Kingdom of Denmark: Sjælland; Within the Kingdom of Sweden: Visby; Within the Kingdom of Scotland: the Isles, Mann; Within the Kingdom of Maghreb: Canarias; Within the Kingdom of Valencia: Mallorca; Within the Kingdom of Sardinia: Sardinia, Corsica; Within the Kingdom of Sicily: Sicily; Within the Kingdom of Venice: Venice; Within the Kingdom of Epirus: Cephalonia; Within the Kingdom of Krete: Krete; Within the Kingdom of Cyprus: Cyprus. The following Counties: Within the Kingdom of Denmark: Bornholm; Within the Kingdom of Sweden: Aland, Öland; Within the Kingdom of Estonia: Osel; Within the Kingdom of Wales: Anglesey; Within the Kingdom of England: Wight; Within the Kingdom of Thessalonika: Chios, Lesbos, Naxos, Rhodos. The most powerful island holder is the Byzantine Empire. Try starting as Jarl Haesteinn in 867 and take a part of Sardinia to get in range of them. Then immediately invade Thessalonika with mercenaries to capture both the islands in it and to take Constantinople away from them to weaken them for future wars. Form or usurp a duchy, but don't form the kingdom of Thessalonika yet as having a kingdom will block the Elevate the Kingdom of Mann & the Isles decision. Conquer weaker islands to build Haesteinn's fame to that of a Living Legend. Wait for Ivar the Boneless or his event spawn troops to die and take the Isle of Mann. Then use Elevate the Kingdom of Mann & the Isles decision to get a kingdom title and more event spawn troops. Use these troops to battle the powerful Karlings, Wessex, Arabs, and the Byzantines for the rest of the islands. In version 1.3.1 you can go over 80 realm size, for the achievement to unlock you will have to go under the 80 realm size and reload the save file. This is due to the game only checking if it is possible at the start of the game and does not (yet) add any flags to the game to fully disable it. After getting this achievement consider doing the Miklagarðaríki achievement in the same playthrough: the empire of Italia only needs 42 counties (you already have Corsica and Sardinia) and if the kingdom of Italy exists you can annex it in one war.

description_en: Starting as the Piasts in 867, rule Poland, adopt Feudalism, and own a Famed or Illustrious-rarity regalia, crown, weapon, and armor.
how_to_en:
Playing as Siemowit of Greater Poland in 867 Kingdom of Poland
Government is Feudal
Famed or illustrious armor
Famed or illustrious crown
Famed or illustrious regalia
Famed or illustrious weapon The fastest way to adopt Feudalism is to use the "Adopt Feudal Ways through Liege" decision. Conquer land in Poland until you are stronger than the ruler of Great Moravia. Then border Great Moravia and convert to Catholicism so the leader will want to take you as a vassal. Swear fealty to Great Moravia and take the decision to become feudal. At this point either fight for independence to be able to form Poland or take over Great Moravia from within. Either way, make sure you own and keep the Kingdom of Poland.

how_to_en: Starting as a member of the Pugyel dynasty Empire of Tibet Achievable in a couple of decades as Chéchentsa Tsédé of Gugé in 1066. Restart until you get a Diplomacy education and respec perks to get True Ruler. Almost everything in the empire of Tibet can be diplomatically vassalized besides the kingdoms of Maryül and Mjinjaa. Claim Maryül as the dynasty head. To allow for more vassalization, sway the targets, and create the kingdoms that are de jure above them. Focus on wealth for faster title creation. Mjinjaa is not necessary to create the empire, but can be subjugated with a high enough level of fame; if this is the goal, prioritize prestige & fame instead of gold.

Without going into great detail, big cats are easier to find in African desert or Indian jungle; lynxes and bears in Europe, the steppe and Tibet. While targeting any animal, it's also possible to randomly encounter a wolf, hyena, or any of the aforesaid five animals, and with very high diplomacy, choose to befriend the animal, which will capture it if successful. Wolves and hyenas count for the achievement in the random event, but there is no option to capture them when they are intentionally targeted. The Slay Beast intent does not prevent capture opportunities.

The Seasoned track requires encountering Danger events while traveling, so ensure your Caravan Master and travel options do not make travel Safety too high, and then plan travels which make detours through provinces with appreciable Danger. It's possible to modify the route while the travel is ongoing to make further detours towards short-lived dangers like battles and sieges. Choosing the safest options in Danger events may lead to reduced or zero Seasoned experience.

description_en: Contract, and recover from, the Bubonic Plague
how_to_en: Recovered from the Bubonic Plague In game rules set Plague Frequency to Doomsday and allow Black Death to happen at any point. Create a custom character with the Herculean/Amazonian, Strong, Temperate and Conscientious Scribe traits. Take the Medicine focus and the Whole of Body perks and always employ the best Personal Physician you can. Once a Bubonic Plague appears travel to the infected baronies. Catching the plague can be tricky, raising an army with your character as general and stationing it in an infected barony give you the highest chance to get it. The Personal Physician medical treatment event must happen within 1 year after getting Bubonic Plague. If you never get it, just fire and rehire them. When the event takes place, choose the risky treatment option.

description_en: Starting in 1178, take the Decision to Re-Establish the Theodosian Borders.
how_to_en: Year is 1178 Taken the Re-Establish the Theodosian Borders decision In 1178, play as Salāh al-Din of Ayyubid. Immediately declare a holy war for Jerusalem; you should win this war with ease. The decision requires that you control the Kingdoms of Syria, Jerusalem, and Egypt, the duchy of Diyarmudar in Jazira, the duchies of Amman and Shammar in Arabia, and the duchy of Syrte in Africa, in addition to every Byzantine kingdom except Serbia, Croatia, Armenia, and Georgia. Continue conquering the required land while building up piety (hold off on targeting Rum for now, a single de jure war can take them later), then convert to a Christian faith of your choosing, swear fealty to the Byzantine Empire, and adopt Administrative government. You can now focus on becoming emperor. Saladin's stats are very good, so you should have little trouble promoting yourself and slandering others to get yourself to the top of the succession. Once the emperor dies, seize whatever land you didn't already conquer and take the decision.

description_en: Starting as a nomadic ruler in the Eastern Steppe, migrate to the Western Steppe.
how_to_en:
Nomadic government
Realm is in the Eastern Steppe Migrated to the Western Steppe You can change the size of your horde for the migration target. There should always be herder counties to migrate to, so you can shrink from a higher title (duchy and above) to a county-level horde that only occupies one county at the end of the migration. Do this if you want to migrate fast and don't want to deal with wars, especially with confederations, as that could easily mean 10k~100k "coalitions" to deal with. Also, the Khazars could be a pain to deal with, since they can occupy most of the western steppe, but there usually should be at least one county be either independent or herder. The only other concern is gold and the army. If you have too many MAAs, you could have negative income after shrinking from a duke to a count, yet you still need a good army to deal with enemies. Excecise good judgement in balancing the two.

how_to_en: Passed all exams with the same character Follow the guide for Stamp of Approval first. how_to_en: If you just keep murdering a random house's family members either through events or intrigue, you should be able to get to Feuding status pretty quickly. Try to do this to a house that isn't in a bloc, as that'd complicate actually winning the war. Once you're at feuding status you can just declare war once you're stronger & take their capital to win. Creating a custom martial/intrigue character should make this whole process quicker.

description_en: Found the Dai Viet Empire
how_to_en: Owns the Dai Viet Empire The only things required for this decision are owning the Kingdoms of Viet and Champa as an independent Viet culture character with a realm capital somewhere in Viet. Start as Viet in either 1066 or 1178, either with the historical rulers or a custom war-focused character, and conquer the rather small kingdom of Champa with county expansion Casus Bellis. 1178 affords the quickest start, especially with a custom character, as Champa doesn't start as your Tributary and you won't have to wait for a truce before beginning your conquest. It will nonetheless probably take longer to get the 2000 Prestige required for the decision than it will to meet the territorial requirements.

description_en: Reach the highest level of Merit
how_to_en: Merit Rank 1 You need to play as a vassal with Celestial government. Pick or create a character with high Learning. Start by completing the available Examinations and using the Study scheme. Join every Examination you see, prioritizing Capital Examinations if one is happening, and always pick options that give Merit. Once appointed to a governorship, either recruit Men-at-Arms (if a Military governor) or build buildings and increase your tax income (if any other type of governor) to rapidly increase your passive Merit gain. More expensive Men-at-Arms have a greater impact on monthly Merit gain, so you should buy the most expensive Men-at-Arms you can. Black Armoured Cavalry are a good choice, as they are the most expensive.

description_en: As a Mandala ruler, have a Godlike level of piety, rule an empire, and have 100 radiance
how_to_en:
Mandala government
Godlike level of devotion
100 Mandala Radiance
Owns an empire A ruler must die with the Religious Icon level of devotion to unlock Divine. Their heir must die with Divine to unlock Demigod. And their heir must die with Demigod to unlock Godlike. They must also die in a way that is acceptable by their Mandala Aspect, however Natural Causes (essentially anything that doesn't result from a war, scheme, activity, or disease) is acceptable to all Aspects. Piety is gained through Mandala Rituals, Tributaries, and Pilgrimages.

description_en: As Jarl Hæsteinn, become Hegemon of China
how_to_en: Playing as Jarl Hæsteinn of Montaigu in 867 Owns the Hegemony of China title The main part of this achievement is to get to China in time before you die or it explodes. You can use the Adventure CB more than once, to make sure you're out of range for the King of France which will try his best to kill you. You can use the regular "take county" CB to puncture your way, hopping from county to county (e.g. Dalmatia -> Sinai -> Oman -> Gujarat -> Bengal -> Vietnam). Try to not use your special units as they don't repopulate. Once you border China you will get the Claim the Mandate CB. Use it, use your armies strategically to defeat an enemy, then take some land and you can enforce demands, getting the achievement

description_en: Claim the Mandate of Heaven as the Head of Faith of a Christian faith
requirements_en: Owns the Hegemony of China title
how_to_en: Can be combined with Fishing in China achievement. Set the Rule Conquerors: Frequency to None or Vicayâla Chola will be a Conqueror and possibly block you from taking the optimal Holy Site. Playing as Hæsteinn, make your way towards India. Take a break after an Adventure CB on a Tribal Duchy on the eastern African coast which will allow you to Raid with the Capture Intent. Make as many prisoners as possible, execute them and undertake Pilgrimages until you have 4000 Piety. Continue and conquer the Holy site of Kerala of Nestorianism in the Raj of Chera Nadu. Then continue without any further Adventure CBs towards the border of China. Once you have the Claim the Mandate CB, convert to Nestorianism, then create a new Christian Faith with you as temporal Head of Faith (new Faiths can't be created while at war). Reset your perks to take the Apostate and Prophet Perks (Hæsteinn already has 7 Learning Perks because the game wants him to have Whole of Body) to reduce costs.
